project.subtitle: La marca no se hereda por lástima
project.hook: La falsa heredera me echó de casa, Parte uno.

base.prompt: Character reference, vertical 9:16, very beautiful young Korean woman, age 23, delicate East-Asian features, luminous skin, dark brown eyes, long straight black hair, elegant but vulnerable expression, cream silk dress, empty hands, neutral soft grey studio background. entrada_convoy.prompt: Same luxury Korean mansion entrance at night, black luxury cars stopped near the marble stairs, wet floor reflecting headlights, warm interior light, empty set, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.

puerta.prompt: EMPTY luxury young woman's bedroom in a Korean mansion, viewed from the doorway, bed stripped bare, open wardrobe, black trash bags on the floor, elegant but violated atmosphere, soft cold morning light, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.

suelo_bolsas.prompt: Same bedroom, low camera near the floor, black trash bags, expensive shoes scattered, stripped bed visible in background, empty set, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.

mesa_larga.prompt: EMPTY luxury Korean mansion dining room, long polished table, expensive chairs, one chair missing on one side, formal mourning meal setting, warm chandelier lighting, no people, no text, realistic K-drama, vertical 9:16.

lado_invitado.prompt: Same luxury dining room, camera from the side of a standing guest, long table edge in foreground, one empty place without plate, warm chandelier lighting, empty set, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.

puerta_principal.prompt: Same grand funeral hall, camera from the main entrance looking toward the staircase, marble floor, black and white flowers, warm light, empty set, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.

desde_escaleras.prompt: Same luxury mansion vestibule, camera from the staircase looking down toward the open front door and rainy night outside, marble floor, warm light, empty set, no people, no text, vertical 9:16.
